subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted to the Beauty of the All-Glorious! In the depths of the heart, the seas of love for the friends surge with waves and fervor [3.5s]... ...O Thou Omnipotent Lord! We are all held within the mighty grasp of Thy power
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبان جمال ابهی در هویه قلب بحور محبت یاران پر موج و هیجان … ای قوی قدیر کل در قبضه قدرت اسیریم تو مجیر تو دستگیر عنایتی کن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
